privacy.metaDescription: How Dalily collects and uses your information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Dalily helps people find trusted local service providers. This policy explains what information we collect during the beta and how we use it.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: We collect account details (such as email and name), business profile information you submit, search queries, and basic usage data needed to operate the platform.

use.title: How we use information
use.body: We use your information to provide search results, manage business accounts, improve the service, and keep the platform secure. Search queries may be logged to improve matching quality.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. Provider contact details you choose to publish may be visible to users. We use infrastructure providers (such as Supabase) to host the service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions during the beta, contact the Dalily team through your account email or business support channel.

terms.metaDescription: Terms for using Dalily during the beta.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Dalily during the beta, you agree to these terms. The service connects users with independent service providers.

service.title: The service
service.body: Dalily is a discovery platform. We help you find providers but do not perform the services ourselves. Features may change during the beta.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for your account credentials and for information you submit. Business accounts must provide accurate profile details.

providers.title: Providers
providers.body: Providers listed on Dalily are independent businesses. Users should verify details and agree terms directly with the provider before work begins.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: Dalily is provided during the beta on an as-is basis. We are not liable for disputes, damages, or service quality between users and providers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back — manage your provider profile
